title: APM: Octo Demo Metric Samples
description: Metric sample inventory for octo-apm-demo. Displays metric names, values, units, and routes as parsed from SOC Application Logs.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and ('Service Name' = 'octo-apm-demo' or 'APM Domain' = 'octo-apm-demo') and 'Metric Name' != null | stats count as Samples, unique('Metric Unit') as Units, unique('Metric Value') as Values, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces by 'Metric Name', 'Service Name', 'Workflow ID', 'Workflow Step' | sort -Samples

ask_ai_prompts: List the octo-apm-demo metric samples and explain what each one measures.
Which metric values suggest latency or error pressure?
